creator: kristinacors
caption: Why I Never Pay Full Price for Luxury Hotels and How You Can Do It Too! #travelhacks #luxuryhotels #ritzcarlton #creditcardpoints #marriottbonvoy

transcription.text: Want to stay at the Ritz-Carlton without paying full price? I'm about to show you how in 60 seconds. By the way, I'm Christina and I'm on a mission to help you travel almost free using travel hacks I wish someone taught me sooner. So one of the ways to stay here almost free is to get a credit card that earns you hotel points. Before you convince yourself it's too complicated, let me walk you through how it works. Step one, you're going to sign up for the Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant American Express card. There are actually a few you can sign up for, but this is the one we'll use for this example. Step two, you're going to use your card for things you'd normally pay for anyway, like groceries, gas, etc. Just make sure to pay the card in full every month. After you spend $6,000 within the first six months, you will earn 100,000 bonus points, which is enough for a Ritz-Carlton stay in a ton of locations. Step three, when you're ready to book, go to the Marriott website, pick a participating Ritz-Carlton and click use points. And your points can cover part or sometimes all of your stay. And I just wanted to point out, yes, the card has a $650 fee, but these perks here definitely outweigh the cost and the card pays for itself. So share this with your travel buddy and follow for more travel hacks.
